{{Quote|Just spraying for Garqi vert-mites. Not much threat here, really, but once they get into a place…|Chala Venan to an employee|<ref name="Union2" />}}
'''Garqi vert-mites''' were a type of [[Arthropod/Legends|mite]] that partially shared its name with [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]],<ref name="Union2" /> an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] in the [[Cassandran Worlds/Legends|Cassandran Worlds]].<ref name="Geonosis">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Wedding of Luke Skywalker and Mara Jade]] to [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].</ref> [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] [[Chik Apla]] and [[Chala Venan]] prepared to [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotage]] the [[Wedding of Luke Skywalker and Mara Jade]] on<ref name="Union2" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="NEC" /> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. When caught hiding in nearby [[Plant/Legends|foliage]] by an [[Unidentified Reflection Gardens employee|employee]] of the venue, the pair claimed they were spraying for Garqi vert-mites inadvertently brought into the gardens by a tourist. After expounding on how they felt the creatures were fast and annoying due to the mite-dust they left behind, the employee believed their claims and left.<ref name="Union2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Garqi vert-mites were mentioned in [[Union 2|second issue]] of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] ''[[Star Wars: Union]]'', which was written by [[Michael A. Stackpole|Michael Stackpole]] and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="Union2" /> on [[December 8]], [[1999]].<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54635/star_wars_union_1999_2|text=Star Wars: Union (1999) #2}}</ref>
